rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies the issue with the loop condition `i <= len` causing an out-of-bounds read at `crc ^= buf[i]`.
rationale.local_fix: The response proposes changing the loop condition to `i < len`, which is an acceptable local fix.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests using a bounded byte-slice abstraction to prevent such off-by-one errors, which satisfies the global fix criterion.
